# Cache — defense plan

1. Fight Mid only with a teammate or a planned fall-back; a solo death opens both sites.
2. Use vent/Connector information to decide whether to hold B Main or anchor site.
3. Keep a player watching A Main while the Mid player repositions.
4. Retake B with Checkers/Heaven pressure together and save a molotov for default.
5. Anti-eco: clear Vents, Forklift, and Checkers before long fights.

## Round rule

Call location, number, and direction, then stabilize or rotate with a clear reason.
